WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, UNIFUND CCR, LLC.
Court on the record granted Plaintiff's Ex-parte application for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ALISON GARDNER.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $29297.68
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,942.30
Attorney's Fees: $800.00
Costs: $604.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $39,643.98
Judgment signed in open court.
